howItWorks.intro: This anchor rode length calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Rode Length
rules.formula: Rode = (Depth + Tide + Bow Height) × Scope Ratio
rules.explanation: Total vertical distance multiplied by the scope ratio.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: What scope ratio should I use?
faq.a: 7:1 for most conditions, 5:1 in calm weather, 10:1 for storms.
All chain provides better holding. Chain + nylon rode is lighter and more common on smaller boats.
